title: 2. Node API and SSE
description: Implement Node API under console/server to read project/config.yaml and project/issues/*.json. Add SSE endpoint that emits full snapshot on changes. Watch project/ with 250ms debounce.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Implemented Node server with config/issues endpoints and SSE stream. Added chokidar watch on project/ with 250ms debounce and full snapshot pushes.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Improved server errors for missing project/config.yaml or project/issues and sorted issues by id for deterministic ordering.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added SSE retry hint for clients (1s).

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: GET /api/config and /api/issues return data; GET /api/issues/:id returns single issue; GET /api/events streams full snapshot on project/ changes with 250ms debounce; clear errors for missing paths.
